description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a striking, aggressive design featuring black and yellow color accents. The headband is thick and padded, with two prominent yellow rectangular connectors on each side. The ear cups are circular and padded, but what stands out most are the sharp, blade-like protrusions extending from the outer sides of each ear cup, giving the headphones a stylized, almost weapon-like appearance. The inner ear pads are gray, contrasting with the black and yellow exterior. The overall build suggests a robust, possibly plastic and metal construction, with a design that is both functional and visually bold. These headphones are likely intended for personal audio use in urban environments, such as on the street or in a park.
description: A pair of black and yellow over-ear headphones with sharp, blade-like protrusions on the ear cups and a thick, padded headband. The design is bold and aggressive, with prominent yellow connectors and gray inner ear pads.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blade-like protrusions on the ear cups and the yellow connectors on the headband.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical ear cups and the full width of the padded headband.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the blade-like protrusions and the yellow connectors, with the ear pads visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the headband and the inner sides of the ear cups, with the protrusions visible from behind.
